transcript: And now, this is Ninja 112, the enemy's right on top of us, where's our ride? Right here, Sergeant. Thank God. I'll keep up the suppressing fire to get the men aboard. You'll be back. Take cover, contact! Here, get him out of here! Get in, get in, hurry! Over right! Go, go, go! Enemy 3 groups in, they're coming in fast! Come in! Get in! Hurry! Go, go, go! They need three groups in. They're coming in fast. Come in! Come on, come on! Hey, Hal. This is Lima 1-3. Ninja 1-1-2 secured. We're RTB. Sergeant, how are your men doing back there? We're good to go, ma'am. That was close. Shit! Come on, girl. I'm just casting this. No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no! Brace for impact! Come on! Up. Up again. Up. Up again. No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, you called me, you okay? Yeah, yeah, I'm okay. You? Rattle, I'm alive. Contact 2 o'clock, 150 meters. Get those grunts out of here. Wait for evac. I'll warm up the cannon. I'll cover you if your ammo's out. Then I'll scuttle. I'm not gonna let them take you. All right, boys, on me. Move, move, move! Don't come together. Keep going! Please, move your ass! Come on! Fuck! Fuck! Oh, my God. God, I'm two, one. Five, four, three, two... She doesn't want to go. Enemy in sight! Fire at will! Fuck! Get off my ship!
